Author: Gamerhacker137
Name: GilMaster
Punchline: Find, gather, and craft the most profitable items on your server.
Description: Scans Universalis for high-demand crafted items matching your level, showing realistic prices and seller competition. Locates gathering spots for materials and drives Artisan (if installed) to craft them. Also includes a DoH/DoL leveling advisor. Use /gilmaster to open.
